name: Braised Chicken with Bacon (Clay Pot)
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Cornstarch dissolved in 2 tbsp Cold water
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the clay pot in cold water for 10 minutes.
2. Truss the chicken securely and place it in the pot, breast side up.
3. Cut the bacon into small pieces and fry until crisp. Drain the bacon and scatter over the chicken breast.
4. Add the onion, garlic, chicken broth, salt, and pepper to the pot.
5. Cover the pot and place it in a cold oven.
6. Adjust the heat to 450°F and cook for 1 1/2 hours.
7. Drain the juices into a small saucepan. Bring to boiling point and stir in the cornstarch dissolved in cold water.
8. Add the chopped parsley or chives to the sauce and pour it over the chicken.
9. The chicken will be so tender that you will not have any difficulty carving it out of the pot.
10. Serve with rice or noodles and a tomato salad.
11. Serves 4 adults and 2 children
